# Soul Good — Design System

Synced from the `launch` app (Next.js). The Brand Kit is the source of truth in `src/lib/brand.ts` + `src/app/globals.css`; cards are static previews for claude.ai/design.

Light theme: Soft Oat background, Forest Depth ink, Sage / Clay / Gold / Sand accents. Headlines EB Garamond, body Arial.
